# OpenSIN Neural Bus

> The event-driven nervous system connecting all OpenSIN agents — durable, replayable, and Ouroboros-aware.

## Documentation
- [README](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Neural-Bus/blob/main/README.md) - Quick start, features, architecture
- [Subject Taxonomy](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Neural-Bus/blob/main/docs/jetstream-subject-taxonomy.md) - Complete NATS subject hierarchy
- [Architecture](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Neural-Bus/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md) - System architecture deep dive
- [Contributing](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Neural-Bus/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) - How to contribute

## Key Information
- License: MIT
- Language: TypeScript, Python
- Protocol: NATS JetStream
- Package: @opensin/neural-bus (npm)
- Repo: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Neural-Bus
- Production NATS: nats://92.5.60.87:4222
